message:
fix(indexer): Reset progress counters when switching to indexing phase

In streaming mode, the progress tracker was not resetting total/current
when switching from scanning to indexing phase. This caused incorrect
progress display (total = num_connectors + batch_sizes instead of just
batch_sizes).

Fix: Reset total and current to 0 on first batch received, then
accumulate as batches arrive.

Also fix: Change &self to &mut self in update_daily_stats_for_conversation
since transaction() requires mutable borrow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
